# googlewallet_issuers (Data Source)

Fetches all Google Wallet Issuers accessible to the authenticated service account.

Use this data source to list all issuers you have access to.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "googlewallet_issuers" "all" {}

output "issuer_count" {
  value = length(data.googlewallet_issuers.all.issuers)
}

output "issuer_names" {
  value = [for issuer in data.googlewallet_issuers.all.issuers : issuer.name]
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all accessible Google Wallet Issuers
data "googlewallet_issuers" "all" {}

output "all_issuers" {
  value = data.googlewallet_issuers.all.issuers
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `issuers` (Attributes List) List of all issuers accessible to the authenticated service account. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--issuers))

<a id="nestedatt--issuers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `issuers`

Read-Only:

- `contact_info` (Attributes) Contact information for the issuer. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--issuers--contact_info))
- `homepage_url` (String) URL for the issuer's home page.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the issuer.
- `name` (String) The account name of the issuer.

<a id="nestedatt--issuers--contact_info"></a>
### Nested Schema for `issuers.contact_info`

Read-Only:

- `alerts_emails` (List of String) Email addresses that receive alerts.
- `email` (String) Primary contact email address.
- `name` (String) Primary contact name.
- `phone` (String) Primary contact phone number.
